title: Senior Software Engineer - Cars24 - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Cars24 - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the Cars24 family as a Senior Software Engineer in Pimpri-Chinchwad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Cars24:
Cars24 is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cars24!
